Id1.text: The ARA Veinticinco De mayo (V-2) comes from the country of Argentina which is led by Mauricio Macri and has the capital city of Buenos Aires.

Id2.text: The ARA Veinticinco de Mayo (V-2) comes from Argentina. Argentina's capital is Buenos Aires and its leader is Mauricio Macri.
